.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(7, 11, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(12, 20, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(20, 31, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(20, 31, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(7, 11, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #141F25 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#141F25, color-mix(in srgb, #141F25 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #141F25 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#141F25, color-mix(in srgb, #141F25 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(129, 213, 208, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 87, 138, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 87, 138, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(180, 145, 237, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(255, 87, 138, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(4, 165, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(4, 165, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(243, 200, 91, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(57, 240, 152, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(129, 213, 208, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(4, 165, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(243, 200, 91, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(7, 11, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(7, 11, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(34, 142, 195, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(7, 11, 13) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(34, 142, 195) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(18, 28, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(21, 34, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) linear-gradient(270deg, rgba(253, 255, 134, 0.75) 0%, rgba(241, 245, 90, 0.9) 88%) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(21, 34, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(21, 34, 44) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr.background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(even).background: rgb(20, 31, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tbody tr:nth-child(odd).background: rgb(14, 22, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

tr.background: rgb(12, 20, 23) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
